case_title: REX P. TABORA VS. 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,250.00 FILED BY TABORA, REX P. AS TO DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY BERNARDO, ED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUL-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BERNARDO, ED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-16-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ED BERNARDO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-16-2011 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TABORA, REX P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,325.00, CLAIM AGAINST ED BERNARDO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $80.64 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TABORA, REX P. AS TO DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $226.56 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO TWENTY TWO HOLDINGS, LLC DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-06-2012 (SERVICE FEE $35.00) AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARDO, ED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-12-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-21-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES HAVE AGREED THAT THE DEFENDANT WILL PAY THE PLAINTIFF $1,000.00 PER MONTH WITH THE FIRST PAYMENT BEING MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF TODAY. MATTER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY 21, 2012 AT 11:00 AM. IF NO APPEARANCE ON THAT DATE, MATTER IS CONTINUED MONTHLY FOR PROGRESS REPORTS TO THE FOLLOWING DATES: JUNE 25, 2012, JULY 23, 2012, AUGUST 20, 2012, SEPTEMBER 24, 2012, OCTOBER 22, 2012, AND NOVEMBER 26, 2012 FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-23-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-20-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT IS MAKING PAYMENTS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-24-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGESS REPORT TO OCT-22-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE CONTINUED PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/12/12. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P.NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/12/12 TO NOV-26-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2012 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-17-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2013 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-21-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 SECOND BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-25-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 2/21/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR OEX PROGRESS REPORT (CASE WAS OFF-CALENDAR BY MISTAKE) HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT 22 HOLDINGS, LLC. DBA SOCIAL KITCHEN & BREWERY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-11-2013 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-18-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE DEFENDANT APPEARED AND PAID $529.00 TO PLAINTIFF WHICH REPRESENTS INTEREST. THE MATTER CONTINUED FOR ONE WEEK, TO VERIFY IF DEFENDANT'S PERSONAL CHECK CLEARS THE BANK. IF NO APPEARANCES, ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED. PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK(S) S.VANTREE AND M.GOODMAN. (506)
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.(506)
